## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## User impact

Explain what changes for users, including disabled, missing-dependency, and error states when relevant.

## Verification

CI runs the lint and headless type-check for you, so there's nothing to run by hand.

- [ ] Tried the change in a running Hyprland or niri session, or said why that wasn't possible
- [ ] Kept unrelated formatting, generated theme files, and personal settings out of the change

## Visual changes

Add before/after screenshots or a short recording when layout, animation, theming, or interaction feedback changed.
